section_header: Chapter 5: Promotion of counteractions against global warming (Mitigation) — 2. Reduction target for greenhouse gas emissions
policy_statement: Set citywide greenhouse gas emissions reduction targets for FY2020, FY2030, and FY2050 relative to FY2013.
verbatim_text:
## 2. Reduction target for greenhouse gas emissions

| Timeframe            | Target Year   | Reduction Target (Total Target Amount)            |
|----------------------|---------------|---------------------------------------------------|
| Long-term Target     | FY2050        | Compared to FY2013 ▲ 80%                          |
| Mid-term Target *1   | FY2030        | Compared to FY2013 ▲ 30%                          |
| Short-term Target *2 | FY2020        | Compared to FY2013 ▲ 5% (Compared to FY2005 ▲ 7%) |
extraction_rationale: Quantified, time-bound mitigation targets adopted by the city (80% by FY2050; 30% by FY2030; 5% by FY2020).

section_header: Chapter 5: Promotion of counteractions against global warming (Mitigation) — *1 Setting of targets by sectors in the mid-term target
policy_statement: Set sector- and gas-specific mid-term (FY2030) reduction targets, including CO2 reductions by sector and reductions for methane, nitrous oxide, and fluorinated gases.
verbatim_text:
## *1 Setting of targets by sectors in the mid-term target

Apart from the total target amount, we set the targets by sector as follows:

- -Carbon Dioxide: Industry sector ▲ 7%, Consumer/household sector ▲ 40%, Consumer/business sector ▲ 40%, Transport sector ▲ 28%, Waste ▲ 6.7%
- -Methane ▲ 12.3%
- -Dinitrogen monoxide: ▲ 6.1%
- -4 gases such as chlorofluorocarbon alternatives: ▲ 25.1%
extraction_rationale: Contains specific quantitative reduction targets by sector and by non-CO2 gases.

policy_statement: Set government-operations greenhouse gas reduction targets for the city office: 5.1% by FY2020 and 30% by FY2030 (base year FY2013), plus FY2020 targets by emission type (administration offices, waste, sewage, water).
verbatim_text:
## 3. Reduction target

| Segment           | Base Year | Target Year | ... | City office |
| Short-term target | FY2013    | FY2020      | ... | ▲ 5.1%      |
...
| Mid-term target   | FY2013    | FY2030      | ... | ▲ 30%       |

...Target by emission type... Emissions from offices concerning municipal administration ... ▲ 9.1%
... Emissions from waste processing ... ▲ 1.1%
... Emissions from sewage processing ... ▲ 4.1%
... Emissions from water supply ... ▲ 2.4%
extraction_rationale: Quantified, time-bound targets specifically for municipal operations, including breakdown by emission source.
